title: Mock Test 62 - Formal Email Writing
description: Formal Email Writing নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Subject line, Salutation, Body, Closing, Formal vocabulary, Polite request, Attachment, CC/BCC।

questions.question: Formal email-এর সঠিক subject line কোনটি?
options: Application for the post of Assistant Manager
questions.explanation: 'Application for the post of...' = clear and formal subject line।

questions.question: Formal email-এ সঠিক salutation কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Dear Mr. Rahman' (যদি নাম জানা থাকে) — formal salutation।

questions.question: যদি recipient-এর নাম না জানেন, কী লিখবেন?
questions.explanation: 'Dear Sir or Madam' — standard formal salutation (name unknown)।

questions.question: Email body শুরু করার সঠিক উপায়?
questions.explanation: 'I am writing to...' = most common formal email opening।

questions.question: কাউকে কিছু attach করলে কী লিখবেন?
questions.explanation: 'Please find attached...' = formal way to mention attachment।

questions.question: Email-এ polite request করার উপায়?
options: I would be grateful if you could...
questions.explanation: 'I would be grateful if you could...' = polite request structure।

questions.question: Formal email-এর সঠিক closing কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Yours sincerely' (যদি নাম দিয়ে শুরু) / 'Yours faithfully' (Sir/Madam দিয়ে শুরু)।

questions.question: CC এবং BCC-এর মধ্যে পার্থক্য কী?
options: CC = সবাই দেখে, BCC = অন্যরা BCC দেখে না
questions.explanation: CC (Carbon Copy) = all recipients see each other। BCC (Blind CC) = recipients don't see BCC-ers।

questions.question: 'I look forward to your response.' — এটি email-এর কোন অংশে বসে?
questions.explanation: 'I look forward to hearing from you.' = closing-এ আশা প্রকাশ।

questions.question: 'Please do not hesitate to contact me.' — এটি কী ধরনের phrase?
questions.explanation: 'Please do not hesitate to contact me.' = formal and polite offer for further contact।

questions.question: Error: 'Dear Sir, I am writing to apply for the job.' — এখানে 'the job' কীভাবে বলা ভালো?
questions.explanation: 'The post' বা 'the position' — 'the job' generic, 'the post' বেশি formal।

questions.question: Error: 'I want to apply for this job.' → আরও formal variant?
options: I would like to apply for this position.
questions.explanation: 'I would like to apply...' = more formal than 'I want to apply...'

questions.question: Error: 'Thanks in advance.' — formal email-এ এটি কেমন?
questions.explanation: 'Thank you in advance' — formal কিন্তু কিছুটা presumptuous (আগেই ধন্যবাদ)। 'I would appreciate your help.' বেশি polite।

questions.question: Error: 'I am attaching my CV herewith.' — সঠিক?
questions.explanation: 'Please find attached my CV.' = more modern and common। 'Herewith' = very old-fashioned but not incorrect।

questions.question: Fill: 'I am writing ___ apply for the post.'
questions.explanation: 'To apply' — Infinitive of purpose।

questions.question: Fill: 'I have attached my resume for your ___ (বিবেচনা).'
questions.explanation: 'For your consideration' = formal। 'For your reference' = your review।

questions.question: Fill: 'Please feel ___ to contact me.'
questions.explanation: 'Please feel free to contact me.' = formal invitation for further communication।

questions.question: Fill: 'I ___ forward to your response.'
questions.explanation: 'I look forward to + noun/gerund' — formal fixed phrase।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আমি আবেদনপত্রের সাথে আমার সিভি সংযুক্ত করছি।'
options: I am attaching my CV with the application.
Please find attached my CV with the application.
questions.explanation: 'Please find attached my CV with the application.' = formal and correct।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আপনার দ্রুত সাড়া পেয়ে আমি কৃতজ্ঞ হব।'
options: I will be grateful for your early response.
I would be grateful for your prompt response.
questions.explanation: 'I would be grateful for your prompt response.' = formal and polite।
